title: Weighted Shortest Paths and Relaxation
description: Choose safe routes across positive, negative, and unreachable weighted networks. Learners cumulatively produce a multi-algorithm route engine with path proofs through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: State and apply edge relaxation while preserving predecessor evidence.
Run Dijkstra only under compatible nonnegative weights and stale-entry handling.
Use repeated relaxation to find shortest paths and reachable negative-cycle evidence.
